title: QAAnswerRecord
description: One structured answer emitted by the fresh read-only QA runner. The QA runner writes an array of these as answers.json; the scorer consumes it.

question.description: The prompt actually sent to the QA agent. Copied from the question for trace completeness.

answer_text.description: Final answer text. Required when status = ok.

citations.description: Vault note references the agent used, if surfaced. Paths relative to the temp vault root.

status.description: Run outcome. 'empty' means the agent explicitly declined / had no answer.

error.description: Error message. Required when status = error or status = timeout.

attempts.description: Number of attempts the runner made per retry policy.

metadata.description: Optional auxiliary metadata (token counts, reasoning traces, etc). Kept minimal by default; never required by the scorer.
